name: Sprout
description: Sprout: An end-to-end set of cloud solutions for streamlining your HR, Payroll, and Business operations. Learn more about Sprout

reviews.review_pros: User interface and user experience is 100% awesome
reviews.review_cons: clocking in and out from the mobile version is not updated. Dashboard cant capture from mobile logging in and out.

reviews.review_description: So far, my overall experience with Sprout has been good. The platform delivers on what it promises, and it’s been a positive addition to my workflow.
reviews.review_pros: User-friendly interface: The platform is intuitive and easy to navigate, even for beginners. Efficient tools!
reviews.review_cons: Learning curve to specific tools - few features may take time to understand. but so far i experience less technical glitch

reviews.review_pros: It is perfect when using the program to assist in HR payroll systems
reviews.review_cons: It has a biometric recognition so which makes it a little hard to access if original user is no more

reviews.review_pros: Sprout Payroll Solutions has proven to be a reliable and efficient platform for managing payroll and HR-related processes.
reviews.review_cons: As a user, I found Sprout PMS to be not particularly user-friendly. While the system offers useful features for performance management and employee tracking, the overall interface can be quite overwhelming and unintuitive, especially for first-time users.

reviews.review_description: it helps us to lessen payroll time and it generates comprehensive reports on payroll. it also ease our time in opening the site because it can be viewed online
reviews.review_pros: very helpful in our payroll processing and it our e 201 file and documents safe keeping. it also helps us generate detailed payroll reports
reviews.review_cons: limitations on access especially to assigned user. need to improve generation of reports on sprout HR

reviews.review_description: Overall, great experience. Our processes really improved and since it was user friendly our employees use them very well too
reviews.review_pros: Very efficient and user friendly, it helped to streamline our processes with HR and also for Payroll
reviews.review_cons: None so far, we like the services provided by Sprout HR to our company. We’ve been using Sprout for almost 5 years

reviews.review_description: Overal my company have been using Sprout for 2 years and i have been very satisfied and happy with the platform and app
reviews.review_pros: The accessibility of the app with their staff access and their movie app. this will me to quickly get things done in computer than manual.
reviews.review_cons: How i cannot see the full staff details in the app, im always on the road and most of the time i need to quickly check a staff’s detail

reviews.review_description: Staying with Sprout, proud using sprout. My experience with Sprout was smooth, efficient, user-friendly, and helpful for daily tasks
reviews.review_pros: I liked Sprout’s user-friendly interface and how it simplifies HR and payroll processes efficiently.
reviews.review_cons: I didn’t have any major issues with Sprout—everything worked smoothly for my needs.

reviews.review_description: It has made my life as an hr practitioner easier and process things faster, from payroll, to attendance tracking
reviews.review_pros: Sprout HR, convenience, and how the employees can now easily access their timekeeping records anytime
reviews.review_cons: I would appreciate it more if the cam is more responsive and the holiday features does not get deleted annualy

reviews.review_description: So far it is really amazing, we can see that Sprout is very innovative and continues to improve in order to help it's clients.
reviews.review_pros: It's user-friendly interface. It is easy to use even the employees are not having a hard time while using it.
reviews.review_cons: There are some glitches and sudden updates, but the solutions team are on hand in troubleshooting the problem.

reviews.review_pros: Cost efficient and very user friendly on the hr and employee access
reviews.review_cons: Feature requests can sometimes take time. Wait for other companies to request the same

reviews.review_description: I have very good experience. I am super happy the way they introduce many alternatove topics.
reviews.review_pros: Enhancements of knowledge in Hr. It allows me to grow my HR knowledge. It makes me woden my connections.
reviews.review_cons: They did not anticipate parking. no anticipation on tge number of guest

reviews.review_description: All good! Keep innovating! Really helpful!
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and Sprout Experts are really expert and helpful! 🤗

reviews.review_pros: Digital Transformation: AdSpark is currently a client of Sprout, and we're pleased to continue our collaboration with other clients as well.
reviews.review_cons: I believe we're seeking additional services, as we're currently only using payroll and want to explore more options from Sprout.

reviews.review_description: I would rate it 8.5/10 since its very helpful for our company even though we’re just using it for our timekeeping and payroll

reviews.review_title: Sprout is very convenient is easy to use, the price is quite cheaper than other HR software
reviews.review_pros: Sprout's best feature is that they offer HR Management system that is very efficient and cost-effectively. With using Sprout, I can monitor my employees deployed from other parts of the country in an easy way using the geo-tag. Since employees have firsthand access to their time records, preparing payroll, is very convenient to use provided that the employees' data are correct and without any missing inputs.
reviews.review_cons: If there is a thing that can be improved using Sprout, it is the app because most of the time, we experience down times and sometimes doing bulk uploads are error even when you followed the right instructions and complied to what the system is saying. Also, bulk upload templates should be simplified, if possible, must choose and include only selected criteria that needs to be updated.

reviews.review_description: It was great experience was very fast and good
reviews.review_pros: Hr Payroll and its function specially payroll
reviews.review_cons: None so far very happy with sprout so all okay
